heading: Applicability of administrative procedure provisions
label: 266 Applicability of administrative procedure provisions
text: Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5 shall apply to all proceedings under this Act, sections 261 to 264 of this title, and .section 265 of this title
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the “Uniform Time Act of 1966”. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 89–38780 Stat. 107section 260 of this titleApr. 13, 1966

Codification“Subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5” substituted in text for “The Administrative Procedure Act (1)” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.5 U.S.C. 1001–101Pub. L. 89–554, § 7(b)80 Stat. 631Sept. 6, 1966
